chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P Nos.D-3357 and 3359 of 2025 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 05.08.2025 Mr. Ramiz Naseem, advocate for the petitioners in both petitions. Mr. Qamaruddin Nohri, APG. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG. Ms. Wajeeha Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General. ------------- Learned counsel for the petitioners states that he will be satisfied if this petition is disposed of in terms of order dated 29.05.2024 passed in C.P Nos.D-2058 and 2244 of 2025. Learned APG, AAG and Assistant Attorney General have no objection to such proposition. Order accordingly. The relevant part of the order dated 29.05.2025 is set up below for ease of reference:- “Comments filed and it is stated on behalf of respondents as follows:- To allow to verify their legal documents through Ministry of Foreign Affairs for confirmation of their genuineness. To allow to verify their status, criminal record CRO / CRI accordingly because they are illegally staying in Pakistan since long. To direct D.G NADRA Sindh to verify the petitioners through Bio- Matric for NADRA registration, if petitioners register in NADRA, their CNICs may be cancelled/Blocked and also provide clearance certificate to petitioners. To allow, to deport to their native country, after completing legal and required formalities under the Foreigner Act, 1946.” The instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
